Container.Name: tontine-stayalive
Container.Overview: Daily tontine.cash stay-alive check-in with diagnostics, Discord notifications, a health endpoint, and an alive/safe stats watcher. Before starting, copy stay-alive.js, package.json, entrypoint.sh and healthcheck.js into the App Code folder. Browsers are baked into the image; node deps install on first start.
Container.Description: Watcher that performs the daily tontine.cash check-in for your own account and reports to Discord.

Config.Name: App Code
Config.Description: Folder containing stay-alive.js, package.json, entrypoint.sh and healthcheck.js

Config.Name: State
Config.Description: Persists state.json and game.json across restarts

Config.Name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
Config.Description: Discord webhook URL. Change this (and restart) to target a different channel.

Config.Name: ATTEMPTS_PER_DAY
Config.Description: Randomized attempts spread across the window

Config.Name: WINDOW_HOURS
Config.Description: Attempts land in the first N hours of the ET day

Config.Name: OVERTIME
Config.Description: Keep retrying past the window until just before midnight

Config.Name: HEALTH_PORT
Config.Description: Container port the status server listens on (match the container side of the port mapping)

Config.Name: WATCH_STATS
Config.Description: Alert on alive (purges) and safe (check-ins working) changes

Config.Name: STATS_POLL_MIN
Config.Description: How often (minutes) to poll the stats endpoint

Config.Name: ERROR_RENOTIFY_HOURS
Config.Description: Suppress identical errors to Discord for this many hours

Config.Name: TZ_NAME
Config.Description: Timezone the daily deadline is measured in

Config.Name: Skip browser download
Config.Description: Browsers are preinstalled in the image
